name: ai-agent-manager-plugin
description: AI agents v10.3: QA topology auto-detection — QA Executor now detects app_topology (ui_present, api_style, client_platform), auth method, and WebSocket presence in Phase 4. Supports REST, GraphQL (5-step fallback chain: SDL → resolvers → codegen → persisted queries → introspection), API-only backends (OpenAPI-first discovery), mobile-backend apps, and SSO/OAuth apps (--auth-state flag). New Gate 10 for GraphQL coverage with budget-aware tiers (≤20 full, 21-50 sampled, >50 top-20 cap). GRAPHQL_RISK_OVERRIDES contract for machine-readable Strategist → Executor risk write-back into api-calls.json. 13-gate audit (Gate 6 skipped for non-UI apps). Auto-generated minimal Playwright config for API-only apps. Plus v10.2 features: Launch Pad Plan Review gate, 12 agent roles, 47 reusable skills, quality gate hooks, persistent agent memory, bundled MySQL MCP server.
